bio:
Hi, I'm Dennis – a self-employed master hairdresser and blonde specialist in Berlin Friedrichshain. For over 16 years, I've specialized in bleaching, balayage, lived-in looks, and natural, multidimensional hair color. If you're looking for a blonde expert in Berlin who combines high-quality results with healthy hair, you've come to the right place. My focus is on modern techniques that allow for smooth transitions, clear blonde tones, and perfect nuances – all without compromising hair quality. Every color treatment is individually tailored to your hair type, your daily routine, and your long-term hair structure. I work with professional brands such as Olaplex, Evo Hair, Danger Jones and other high-performance products to guarantee you long-lasting, healthy and vibrant color results. Whether it's bleaching, balayage, root coloring, glossing or a complete color transformation: my goal is for you to leave my chair with a look that suits you – modern, individual and effortless.
  • 16+ years shaping blondes and lived-in color.
  • Every result is tailored to hair type, lifestyle, and health.
  • No one-size-fits-all coloring. Only subtle luxury.
